englishDefinitions: (informal) Unwell or upset; in a bad state of mind or health.
persianTranslation: (غیررسمی) Unpleasantly sticky; خوش طعم نفرت انگیز
(غیررسمی) ناخوش یا ناراحت؛ در وضعیت روحی یا سلامتی بد
examples: I stepped in something icky and it smells terrible.
I'm not going to work today. I just feel icky.
